title: Rich Mediterranean Garlic Stir-fry
description: A rich and tender mediterranean dish featuring garlic granules, perfect for a brunch mood that is also high-protein-friendly.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season chicken with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add garlic granules, cook for 30 seconds until golden brown, remove from pan and set aside.
Sauté bell peppers and zucchini in the same pan until tender. Stir in tomato paste and lemon juice, cooking for another minute.
Add chicken to the pan with vegetables, season with salt and pepper. Cook for about 5 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
Transfer mixture to a baking dish and top with the reserved garlic granules. Bake for 10-12 minutes until juices are bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped basil leaves.
